name: C-4 checkpoint file includes a signature field signed against the signing key per the architecture
command: for i in 1 2; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e$i --actor a --data '{}'; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --emit-checkpoint-now && ckpt=$(ls compliance/audit-checkpoints/*.json | head -1) && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8"));process.exit(j.signature&&j.signature.startsWith("sha256:")?0:1)' "$ckpt" && echo signed 1>&2
